locality.detail: Google g2 + L4 coordinator node in project `openagentsgemini` on private subnetwork `oa-lightning-us-central1-psion-swarm-coordinator`.

accelerators.detail: Machine type `g2-standard-8` with one retained L4 accelerator.

backend.detail: Google swarm nodes currently retain the CUDA open-adapter backend and do not claim mixed-backend dense participation.

network.egress_posture: private VPC regional egress in `us-central1` on `oa-lightning`
network.detail: Cluster traffic stays inside dedicated subnetworks with explicit impairment profiles and no external IPs.

storage.detail: Google launch authority keeps shared artifacts in GCS and uses the local boot disk only as node-local staging.

cost.detail: The retained Google fixture keeps an explicit per-run ceiling but does not retain a canonical hourly price quote.

refusal_examples.detail: source `google_l4_validator_node` does not yet admit `DenseFullModelRank` under backend `Cuda` and the current claim boundary refuses widening beyond its retained lane evidence

authority_artifacts.detail: Frozen Google two-node swarm contract that owns the node role, cluster namespace, bucket root, and cluster ports.
Google launch profile that retains the g2-standard-8 plus L4 machine facts and run-cost ceiling.
Google network posture that retains the dedicated subnetworks and regional private-network assumptions.
Google identity profile that retains the target tags and service-account authority behind the node.

claim_boundary: This source contract proves one private Google g2 plus L4 node can be compared and admitted through the shared training-facing machine contract. It does not claim provider API automation closure, dense-rank runtime closure, or mixed-backend dense participation by itself.
